name: Papaya Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Vanilla Extract or Almond Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the dry ingredients: amaranth flour, white flour, dry milk, baking powder, and sea salt (if using).
2. In another bowl, whisk together the vegetable oil, honey or maple syrup, water, and vanilla extract or almond extract.
3. Combine the wet and dry ingredients in a third bowl, stirring until well mixed.
4. Spoon spoonfuls of batter onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
5. Press a chunk of chopped dried papaya into the center of each cookie.
6. Bake at 325°F for 12-15 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack before serving.
Makes about 18 cookies.
